UI Mock Pack Open portal Open login

Config-driven company themes

Pick a company from the dropdown. Links update automatically. Add a new company by editing shared/companies.json (colors + logo + mode). No code changes required.

View portal View login
To add a new company later 1) Add an entry in shared/companies.json 2) Provide palette + logoSvg + loginMode ("page" or "modal") 3) The dropdown and pages update automatically
